# Portfolio Website Project Instructions

## Project Overview
Modern, professional portfolio website built with Next.js, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, and Framer Motion.

## Tech Stack
- Next.js 16.1.4 (App Router with Turbopack)
- React 19.2.3
- TypeScript 5.9.3
- Tailwind CSS 4.1.18
- Framer Motion 12.29.0
- PostCSS with @tailwindcss/postcss

## Project Status
- [x] Create project instructions file
- [x] Get Next.js project setup information
- [x] Scaffold Next.js project structure
- [x] Create data structure and content files
- [x] Build core components
- [x] Implement pages and sections
- [x] Add dark/light mode system
- [x] Configure styling and responsiveness
- [x] Create comprehensive README
- [x] Install dependencies and test build

## Key Features
✅ Dark/Light mode with persistence
✅ Responsive design (mobile, tablet, desktop)
✅ Smooth animations with Framer Motion
✅ Project filtering by technology
✅ Contact form
✅ SEO-friendly metadata
✅ Easy content editing via JSON files
✅ Production-ready build verified

## Architecture
- Component-based structure
- Separation of data and presentation
- JSON-based content management
- Modular and scalable design
- Server-side rendering with static generation

## Development Server
Running at: http://localhost:3000

## Build Status
✅ Production build successful
✅ All pages generated statically
✅ TypeScript compilation successful
✅ No errors or warnings
